title: Regime-adaptive entry: only trade when both trend (SMA50>SMA200) and vol regime (vol_21d < 25th pct) align

body.hypothesis: Regime-adaptive entry: only trade when both trend (SMA50>SMA200) and vol regime (vol_21d < 25th pct) align

config.hypothesis: Regime-adaptive entry: only trade when both trend (SMA50>SMA200) and vol regime (vol_21d < 25th pct) align
